title: Burrito Powered Coding...
summary: Better Stack discusses using Chipotle's promotional offer to obtain free access to AI coding tools, specifically Claude Code. The title and hashtags frame this as a humorous exploration of AI development methods and potential legal gray areas.
writeup: Better Stack walks through using a Chipotle promotional offer to obtain free access to Claude Code, framing the stunt as a humorous look at cost optimization in AI-assisted development. The piece leans on the comedy of the burrito-for-tooling angle while flagging that the approach sits in a legal gray area. The takeaway: a promo offer can be repurposed as a route to free coding tool access, presented more as a bit than a sanctioned method.
